reviews.name: places/ChIJI6yWAC1304kR6XW4konuvSc/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxd04yTk5lak53ZDBrelZGUnJZVkZXU1VneE9WRRAB
reviews.text: I went for my first appointment the other day and was blown away at the level of care and integrity here at Titan X. Bob has a deep level of understanding regarding the process of tox and the potential based on what results you are looking for and what is feasible with your anatomy. We thoroughly went through the initial concern coming in, the skincare that I currently use, and what an ongoing treatment would look like. Then explained using what muscles would be impacted based on the location of the tox and what to expect results to start to look like. Bob encouraged a practical approach of “less is more” really emphasizing that small changes can do more than trying to use a lot of product. It was a welcoming change to some of his competitors approach that pushes to target all areas of the face all at once!

reviews.name: places/ChIJI6yWAC1304kR6XW4konuvSc/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pSek5FbDFXRkJLUkhsUVgxbFphMDEzU1c1ak1HYxAB
reviews.text: I went there for botox and highly recommend. The office space is very clean and the receptionist is very sweet. Dr Bob is very knowledgeable and made me feel at ease. He took the time to get to know me and my concerns and the results were amazing. Wednesday is ladies night so if you ladies are thinking of getting a touch up,  give titan health a try, you will not be dissapointed.

reviews.name: places/ChIJI6yWAC1304kR6XW4konuvSc/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xSdVEyUndUVmgyZVRZd05HaG1aMTh0ZHpCeGFuYxAB
reviews.text: Had our first visit at TitanX and Bob did not disappoint. Scheduling was easy. He was incredibly knowledgeable and really helped to guide me toward the best treatments for my goals. The office is meticulous. Highly recommend 10/10

reviews.name: places/ChIJI6yWAC1304kR6XW4konuvSc/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xSbFNHMHRWMjlQVDFsTlRUVjNOSFZ5ZDFVeFozYxAB
reviews.text:
I recently visited Titan X’s newly opened men’s health clinic for a consultation, and I can confidently say it was an incredibly positive and thorough experience. From the moment I arrived, the atmosphere was welcoming, professional, and focused on my well-being.
The appointment lasted over an hour, which allowed for an in-depth discussion about my health. Robert took the time to review my bloodwork in detail, explaining each component clearly and answering all my questions with patience and expertise. This wasn’t a rushed visit; it felt like a genuine conversation aimed at understanding my unique health needs.
What stood out most was the comprehensive approach to discussing lifestyle options. Robert provided practical, personalized recommendations for improving my health, covering everything from nutrition and exercise to stress management and preventive care. The options presented were tailored to my goals and current health status, making me feel empowered to take charge of my wellness journey. I highly recommend Titan X  men’s health clinic to anyone looking for a supportive, thorough, and personalized approach to improving their well-being.

reviews.text: Bob was fantastic.  Very knowledgeable and whole process was smooth.   Feeling better already.  Definitely recommend this clinic.

reviews.name: places/ChIJh3_-sRYL3okR25XumWr_BZ8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT201cmRrazRNMEZ4Tms1eWVtWmxOamhHWlMwd1dsRRAB
reviews.text: Nurse Practitioner Kayon Forrest-Gongasingh truly stands out as an exceptional provider. Having dealt with chronic health issues for most of my life, I’ve interacted with countless doctors and medical professionals, and Kayon was one of the most attentive and compassionate I’ve ever met. She took her time, listened carefully to my concerns, and made me feel genuinely heard and valued. This was my first visit with her, yet I immediately felt comfortable and supported. Kayon is incredibly knowledgeable, caring, and a rare presence in today’s medical field. I highly recommend her to anyone seeking a provider who truly cares. Thank you, Kayon, for your compassion, expertise, and outstanding bedside manner.

reviews.name: places/ChIJh3_-sRYL3okR25XumWr_BZ8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21sbGIwOTZWV0ZOWkRsTlRHbFlWamc1ZWtkQmJrRRAB
reviews.text: Nurse practitioner Kayon Forrest-Gongasingh was one of the best providers in the medical field that I have ever dealt with and due to my ongoing illnesses for most of my life, I have seen MANY doctors, nurses, hoapital staff, etc. She spent a very good amount of time listening to my concerns and issues. She was kind, treated me like I matter and genuinely cared and listened to every word I had to say. This was also my first visit with her. I felt very at ease with Kayon and could not recommend her enough. She is knowledgeable and a bright light in the medical field. If you have the opportunity to see Kayon jump on it because people like her do not come around often. Thank you Kayon for your wonderful bedside manner and for all of your knowledge and help!

reviews.name: places/ChIJh3_-sRYL3okR25XumWr_BZ8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pZeFRVcDBOM2xhZDFkT1UwVjBaRzFvZFZKemJXYxAB
reviews.text:
I have been an Endocrinology patient of Albany Med group for over 20 years. I used to drive almost 2 hours from Poughkeepsie to Albany for my diabetes appointments. My first pregnancy with them was fine. My second pregnancy left me wanting and angry.

When I first contacted the office to notify my providers of the new pregnancy, there was 0 communication to my providers and they left my newest appointment to be my 6 month follow-up (typically I see my providers every 3-4 months). I was left to deal with the quickly changing insulin needs of 1st and 2nd trimester on my own, including when I spiraled into a dietary ketoacidosis.

3 months shy of delivering and two weeks after one of my appointments, I received a letter in the mail notifying me that my doctor would be leaving the practice.  I began making arrangements to find a new provider closer to home, however I could only book a new appointment 8 months out in November. I contacted AMC to see if there was a way to bridge the gap, and they assured me based on my history with AMC they would. Megan Hogan (PA) worked well with me, and was flexible in accommodating my need for telephone/telehealth appointments.

However, everything fell apart 6 weeks after delivery. I was induced at 36w instead of 37w for LGA baby and pre-eclampsia. My post-partum diabetes follow up was supposed to be a phone appointment, since baby was still nursing every 1.5 hours (I was maybe 4 weeks post-partum and still recovering from a 3rd degree tear). When the office contacted me to verify I could still make my in-person appointment, I corrected them and said the appointment was supposed to have been phone/virtual. The office responded that I must come in, and I responded there was no way for me to physically make the appointment. Given that, the appointment was then canceled and I have been in-between providers and without an Endocrinologist for 4 months despite AMC assuring me they would not leave me in a lurch.

After 25 years with Albany Med, I feel so hurt to have been allowed to fall through the cracks when I needed help the most. This is just bad medicine.

reviews.name: places/ChIJh3_-sRYL3okR25XumWr_BZ8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w5aE5uZG9Wa2hNWWpoVk1IVnVNblp5YkdOd05IYxAB
reviews.text: My Doctor just moved to this facility.  She is by far the best endocrinologist I’ve ever came across in my whole life! She responds to me quickly through portal. She helped me get medication when my insurance would not approve it. ( Insurance wanted me on a different medication than what I’ve been taking for years) I’m sorry, but my doctor knows better than my insurance company. I will be seeing her at the new location tomorrow. I’m sorry that all of you on this posting has had bad luck with endocrinologist.  If any of you are seeking an endocrinologist. Dr. Susan Demerest is the best endocrinologist I have ever met hands-down!! I almost forgot to mention she also takes her time. She talks to you. She doesn’t rush you out the door and those are key factors for me when I am getting a doctor.  I have been a patient of hers for many years and I will continue to be her patient until the day that she leaves the practice for retirement.

reviews.name: places/ChIJh3_-sRYL3okR25XumWr_BZ8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pKelpYRlpkMjlzTm1nd09XNTZSVXRrU1RKSmQxRRAB
reviews.text: Really the worst experience I have ever had with a practice. I was told that they only treat endocrinology do not diagnose it. It took 9 months of back and forth and 2 canceled appts to be told this.  I would rate a zero if I could.

reviews.text: So ive been seeing Boris for a good while now. He is an amazing doctor. His specialty is hormones and he is also a fantastic general dr. He put me back on my feet in a matter of months. I feel so much better and my blood work has improved drastically. Cant say enough nice things about this doctor. He literally saved my life.

reviews.name: places/ChIJf-gna1BJwokRbJaMrA9W8vg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25rMloyUndRM2sxZEd3eGJHOUVaMWRDTWpKTVJYYxAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Boris Bobyr is everything you wish a doctor would be, compassionate, patient, understanding, and truly invested in your well-being.
His nurses and front desk staff are just as incredible: warm, welcoming, multilingual, and treating every person with genuine respect  like a human being, not a number. One More shoutout Massive love to the nurses and front desk team you’re MVPs. welcoming, smiling, going above and beyond. Certified legends!!!

After bouncing between countless doctors and nurse practitioners who barely listened, who seemed uninterested, disconnected, and honestly didn’t care  finding Dr. Bobyr was a blessing. He takes his time, asks real questions, listens to concerns, and actually works to heal the root of the problem. You can feel the care the moment you walk into this office.

He will be my doctor until he retires  or until my last breath whichever comes first. I will be referring everyone I care about to him from now on. My only regret is not finding him sooner instead of wasting time and money elsewhere.

He repeatedly ignored my requests for  a medication refill. A medication that could not be discontinued suddenly. His staff is rude. The receptionist stated that the medication would be refilled. The prescription was never sent to the pharmacy. Dr. Paukman treated me poorly after I sought out the services of another doctor to treat my renal disease after he basically decided it was not worth treating. He pushes hormone and youth treatment just like a snake oil salesman. He is unethical. He needs to retire

reviews.name: places/ChIJg2idFOVFwokRG05R-iik-bo/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNpbmV6WmZBEAE
reviews.text: I would advise against coming here if you’re looking for a doctor’s office. They give you an appointment and you’re not seen for 3+ hours after that time and I am not exaggerating. I had blood work done here and the lady had no idea what she was doing. She tried multiple areas and bruised me up. I have never had such painful blood work done before. The office is dirty and the women behind the desk are unprofessional and rude. I found a new PCP after two awful visits here and when my new doctor’s office called here for my blood work to be faxed over, the receptionist literally said “I am busy, I don’t have time to” and hung up.

reviews.text: Dr. Paukman is the most caring physician I have ever seen. His office is very busy and Dr. Paukman made me feel as if I were the only patient he was to see that day. I would recommend Dr. Paukman to anyone in need of a cardiologist or primary card Dr.

reviews.name: places/ChIJg2idFOVFwokRG05R-iik-bo/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNDbFBia3BRRRAB
reviews.text:
I bought a Groupon deal for 4-week weightloss package with lipotropic injections. This deal includes consultation, 4 lipotropic iniections, 4 follow-up body composition test, and meds.

After months of trying to get an appointment, I drove an hour to their Brooklyn clinic. Upon arrival, the rude female receptionist tried to claim my visit through my insurance. She didn't understand I purchased a Groupon deal. The nicer male receptionist thankfully resolved this before it turned ugly.

Then the receptionist tried to administer B12 shot. I explained I'm not only here for the shot, and that's when the doctor finally came in.

Body composition test was me merely hopping on a scale, consultation was him reading my BMI off the scale. He then rummaged through his fridge full of expired meds, left the room, and after a while returned with 4 shady syringes. He administered one and gave me the rest to administer on my own. No explanation to how I should store or administer them.

He then again left the room and after a while returned with a shady open bottle of pills with another patient's name on it. How unethical and illegal!!!!!

I asked how I should follow-up for my subsequent body composition test, he says I don't need it.

I don't know what he put in my body, and what I'll put in my body if I continue to administer the shady shots and eat these shady pills. What a complete waste of my money and time. This clinic should close and he should be arrested!!!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJg2idFOVFwokRG05R-iik-bo/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN2a2RUTWVnEAE
reviews.text: Such a nice doctor and so many hard working staff who are kind and are a pleasure to interact with.

reviews.text: I highly recommend working with Igor! He’s incredibly knowledgeable about testosterone therapy, peptides, weight loss, and muscle building. From the start, he took the time to understand my goals, explained all of my options clearly, and designed a personalized plan that made sense for me. Igor is not just focused on quick fixes—he helps you build long-term habits and provides ongoing support throughout the process. Since working with him, I’ve seen real improvements in my energy, strength, and overall health. I’m finally getting the results I was looking for, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience.

reviews.text: Going to the Rochester TRT clinic in Buffalo was one of the best decisions I’ve made. Their testosterone therapy gave me way more energy, helped me build muscle faster, and my libido is back like I’m 20 again. The staff is super helpful, Igor is very knowledgeable and made everything easy to understand. If you're feeling off, this place will get you back on track.

reviews.text:
Today I went to Evlove for PDO threads, and I had such a great experience. Dr. Hasib Sarij was absolutely amazing. He numbed the area first, and when he started placing the threads I honestly didn’t feel a thing. He kept talking with me throughout the whole procedure, which made me feel really comfortable and relaxed.
It’s not always easy to find a doctor who is both skilled and makes you feel at ease, but he definitely does both. I’ll absolutely be recommending him to my friends. If anyone is thinking about getting PDO threads done, I highly recommend going to see Dr. Sarij — he’s awesome!

reviews.text:
Last week I had a great experience with April. She is kind, patient and very experienced. I am 100% satisfied with her services and Dede's services. I have known Dr. Sarij for almost 10 years. There hasn't been a year that's gone by that I have not seen him (for various reasons).
🏆🌟 And after all these years, I Have Just realized that beneath Dr. Sarij's professional demeanor is an Absolute Artist; the meticulous time and work, along with the truly remarkable results I achieved from his care, are nothing short of magic.
Thank you for your kindness and skill!
I wouldn't trust anyone else with my care.
🌟 ⭐ 🌟 ⭐ 🌟

reviews.text: Dr Sarij, was very accommodating, professional and supportive. It was the best experience I’ve had. The staff were very friendly and accommodating. My confidence has been completely restored! I’m looking forward to my next appointment. This is my very happy place!

reviews.text:
Excellent one stop beauty and integrative medicine.

So many excellent machines and procedures a lovely staff and knowledgeable doctor.

I had exomind which was a huge help for some ptsd and anxiety I was experiencing.

Also had PRP for my skin and face - great results.

And had some treatments for my frozen shoulder and pain.

Also the doctor really helped me with my menopause symptoms

As I have just overcome Lyme - I was thrilled to see all of the best natural and effective treatment here - from HBOT to red light.

Overall a great experience and I’ll be coming back for maintenance and more anti aging treatments.

reviews.name: places/ChIJUVwMCBwN3okRlPMPeR2IELU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tOTFFrdE9kMk5hWkV4dGIyWTRabmgwVFVJd1FtYxAB
reviews.text:
I truly appreciate Dr.Singh practice, unlike regular primary care, Dr. Gurpreet Singh is an great primary care and metabolic specialist who truly goes above and beyond for his patients. He takes the time to explain conditions in a clear, thoughtful way and focuses on understanding the root causes rather than just treating symptoms. His approach to metabolic health is modern, evidence‑based, and deeply personalized.

What stands out most is how much he listens. He never rushes appointments and makes sure you leave with a clear plan and a sense of confidence about your health. His blend of internal‑medicine expertise and lifestyle‑focused care makes him an excellent choice for anyone dealing with metabolic issues, chronic conditions, or simply wanting a more proactive, preventive approach to their health.

Highly recommended for patients who want a physician who is knowledgeable, compassionate, and genuinely invested in long‑term wellness.

reviews.name: places/ChIJUVwMCBwN3okRlPMPeR2IELU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25jM1NqZEJVa3MzTkRkS2NISm5XazlxZUZCdFVsRRAB
reviews.text:
I’m very glad I found Dr. Gurpreet Singh as my Primary Care physician. He is courteous, attentive, and always responsive to questions and appointment requests. What I appreciate most is that he tailors treatment to my specific needs rather than giving generic guidance. Dr. Singh listens carefully and takes the time to answer every question until all concerns are addressed.

Scheduling is easy, and there are no long wait
times for appointments. His professionalism and dedication make me feel truly supported in my healthcare. Highly recommend Dr. Singh to anyone looking for a physician who genuinely cares about their patients.

reviews.name: places/ChIJUVwMCBwN3okRlPMPeR2IELU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25aME5sWk1TelZSU1dSbFJFMWZPRVoyZFRCSWMwRRAB
reviews.text: I didn’t know what to expect because there is not a ton of information online. Turns out less is best. I had been looking for an office to complete my DEXA body composition scan and happened to find GS Metabolic. I was concerned because of the negative review, but that couldn’t be farther from the truth. More on that later. This little intimate practice was a pleasant experience! Dr. Singh was extremely knowledgeable and professional. The office is very clean, and put together! I wanted to know how things were going metabolically and he broke everything down and let me ask all of my questions. When he didn’t have an answer that he could produce, he told me the type of doctor I would have to see. As for the accuracy, my home scale that does body composition readings were pretty close to what his numbers provided (i.e. BMI, Bone Mass). I knew from the scale at home that my bone mass was high but he confirmed it. He also explained what I should be striving for metabolically going forward. You should definitely go here for an in depth reading. I plan to return in 6 months to check out my progress! BONUS: FSA/HSA covers it!

reviews.name: places/ChIJUVwMCBwN3okRlPMPeR2IELU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT204M1R6QTFTVkJrUVUxaFFUWmhSM0JYU2kxTlZFRRAB
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough great things about Dr. Singh and his functional medicine practice. From the very first visit, I felt genuinely heard and cared for. Dr. Singh takes his time during every appointment—he answers all my questions without ever making me feel rushed, and he explains everything clearly and thoughtfully.

This deeper, more holistic approach is exactly what I had been searching for, and it has made a real difference in how I understand and manage my health.

The communication at his practice is outstanding as well. Being able to text with questions or concerns—and actually get quick, helpful responses—makes the entire experience so much more supportive and accessible. Scheduling is also incredibly easy, and appointments are set up quickly. Each visit feels personalized, productive, and truly centered around my well-being.

If you’re looking for a doctor who listens, communicates clearly, and is dedicated to uncovering the root cause of your health concerns, I highly recommend Dr. Singh and his practice.

reviews.name: places/ChIJUVwMCBwN3okRlPMPeR2IELU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT214WFJXdHBjelV4VWxkaFkzaEJNV2RvU3kxRWRGRRAB
reviews.text: Gurpreet is a great doctor  spends time listening to patients , uses his medical skills  combined with years of experience. He is a caring human being who prioritizes the overall well-being of the patient. For me, it was his focus on gut health that helped me improve my medical condition without use of medication . I would recommend him to anyone who wants better outcomes holistically

reviews.name: places/ChIJuYTkEc_LXmkRE83wkOVBD9w/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pabWVGaGFOalJQY0dOQ1VuVjJXVmRPUnpGVFNrRRAB
reviews.text:
Working with Anya has truly been a life-changing experience. This is easily the best mental and physical shape I’ve been in my life. I love the way I look and feel, and I feel a renewed sense of self confidence. Her process truly reboots you from the inside out — she understands your body and nutrition goals, gets to the root cause, and builds an actionable plan which empowers you to meet your goals. There isn’t enough space in this post to recount the number of people in my life who have known me for a long time and recognized my transformation (which they learned was from working with Anya). The change is wonderfully obvious.

Anya is so dedicated to her practice and has an incredible depth of knowledge. She’s accessible and a partner in your health journey. She makes tactical recommendations which makes it easy to action against your goals. You truly learn from the experience and are able to implement her knowledge and advice into your daily practice for the future. She’s the best kept secret and I’d recommend her to anyone looking to work on themselves and their health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJuYTkEc_LXmkRE83wkOVBD9w/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tFd09XbDNVbFk1TlcxRWNXaDVkVVJOY1VnMVpGRRAB
reviews.text: One of the best decisions I’ve made as a therapist has been approaching my own health with a holistic route. Having Anya guide me through this journey has been the most helpful experiences. She’s responsive knowledgeable and listens to all my concerns. I’ve seen such a huge change in my health it’s been incredible. You won’t regret working with her!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJuYTkEc_LXmkRE83wkOVBD9w/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25sM2NWaGlNRlJrV0dnME1EVm1ZbGxLZVU5blFsRRAB
reviews.text: Anya has been such a light in my life these past several months. I was struggling with digestive issues and navigating an endometriosis diagnosis and Anya was able to guide me in the right direction! She provided me with information on what supplements to take, gave me food/recipe recommendations to fit within what I was already doing, and overall holistic wellness advice. I truly wouldn't be in a better place right now if it wasn't for her. She knows what she is talking about and I couldn't recommend her more!

reviews.name: places/ChIJuYTkEc_LXmkRE83wkOVBD9w/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25Vd1RUVmFOVzl0U1VsUlQyWkRNbmhsT0ZkTmFtYxAB
reviews.text:
Working with Anya has been nothing short of life-changing. She’s incredibly knowledgeable, compassionate, and truly takes the time to understand your individual needs rather than offering a cookie-cutter approach. Her depth of expertise in functional health, hormones, and gut healing is unmatched and what I appreciate most is how she connects everything back to the bigger picture of your overall well-being.

Every recommendation she’s made has been intentional and effective, and I’ve seen real results both physically and mentally. You can tell she genuinely cares about her clients and wants to see them thrive. I can’t recommend Anya enough — if you’re serious about transforming your health, she’s the one to work with.

reviews.name: places/ChIJuYTkEc_LXmkRE83wkOVBD9w/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT204NWRYYzRkRTFmWm1OTlkwcFNjSFpCWXkxTFExRRAB
reviews.text: I have had the pleasure of working with Anya over the past year. I came to Anya when I was so fatigued and upset being let down by Practitioners who did not know how to help me with the care I required. Being able to meet with Anya to undergo testing that specifically needs to be performed based off of my history and symptoms with continued guidance on a health plan has been so beneficial for me mentally and my overall health. I have had great improvements over the past year, and we continue to work on what needs to be addressed. Anya is extremely intelligent, has solutions and ideas to hopefully resolve specific lab values or symptoms, and can describe medical terms in a more understanding way. If you are at a point in your health where you need additional support/guidance to tackle your symptoms, Anya is the practitioner for you! Without her, I would be lost in my medical mystery continuing to go to provider after provider with the slightest hope and begging for improvement or guidance in my health journey.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVVVl075ZwokRpvtKYbQc6tg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tocGEyZEhlbXhGYldRMlVFNVNVVkU1UW1WcVpWRRAB
reviews.text:
I have been a patient at Callen-Lorde since 2012, and the care has been consistently exceptional. From the moment you arrive, the security team makes you feel safe and respected. The front desk staff are welcoming and attentive, always ready to assist with patience and professionalism. Nurses provide thoughtful, thorough care, and the doctors take the time to listen, explain, and ensure you feel valued as a patient.

Over more than a decade, I’ve experienced firsthand how every member of the team—from security to staff, nurses, and doctors—works together to create a supportive environment. At Callen Lorde, you don’t just receive healthcare—you experience dignity, respect, and genuine compassion.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVVVl075ZwokRpvtKYbQc6tg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25SbVoyMTRRbkYxVlZCVVZGRXlMVXBUZDNOaFpXYxAB
reviews.text: I was informed of this clinic from a friend nothing but wonderful experience. I did the walkin clinic over the weekend as I am new patient. As a new patient I was treated with respects and was well informed by the medical provider…. I must say Jeff provided excellent care walk me through the process and Nurse Vivian was very comforting.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVVVl075ZwokRpvtKYbQc6tg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t4RVZqY3RWRmhJVVcxbFJUaHlTR2RhWXpscVNVRRAB
reviews.text:
This is possibly the worst clinic I’ve ever been to. My provider took a whole week to refill my prescription. I moved during that time. She sent the refill to my old pharmacy out of state. This is not the first time she has taken nearly a week to write a script. I find it crazy how incompetence is normalized at Callen Lorde. Now I have to do a run around trying to get my medication filled, it can’t be transferred to another pharmacy since it’s a controlled substance. So I have to get someone at Callen to write another new prescription….and who knows how long that will take….

I’m switching the Mount Sinai. I recommend you go somewhere where the providers actually take their patients seriously

reviews.name: places/ChIJVVVl075ZwokRpvtKYbQc6tg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGRk5GOHdValZaUjA5alJGSnFXRWxpTkRaamEzYxAB
reviews.text:
My main method of transportation in NYC is skateboarding.

I've been utilizing this clinic for over 6 years now. In the last 5 months, I've been getting a lot of flack and pushback from the security team about bringing my skateboard into the building due to some "policy. "

When I tried to enter the building for an appointment, I was denied entry by the security team because of my board. When I asked the the security guard tons how me he policy he stammered and stuttered and made a phone call to his boss claiming he'd come downstairs to show me the policy. They wasted my time and never showed up.

The front desk staff swooped in and was super supportive.

They were the ones who printed out the policy on what can and cannot enter the building. On this policy there is NO mention of a skateboard. Let it be know there is NO policy listed on the Callen Lorde website nor is posted anywhere physically in their walk-in area.

I arrived 10 mins early to my appointment and due to this back and forth about some unidentifiable policy I arrived to my appointments 12 mins late. Thank God, I was able to be seen.

reviews.text: Been a patient here since 2012, love the help im getting and love the new changes, although don't really like the pharmacy's new look where there isn't any privacy and anyone can hear your business, sadly that's what we have to deal with .

reviews.text: I've been there 2x's.  April of '24 and Nov '24 for Dexa Scans.  It was an incredibly easy and everyone there (I went when they were not busy).  The techs are also pleasant and explain everything.  I was sent to Cenegenics through a 3rd party who I met with to explain the results.  They were very respectful of that, asked if I had any questions and there was no "up sell" but had a feeling they would have if I just went straight to them.  It would make total sense to up sell their services since just getting a Dexa with no guidance or explanation of the results is pretty silly when they offer a lot of services.    I'm getting ready to get another (my 3rd) scan soon and just using Cenegenics directly without the 3rd party since I'm pretty comfortable with the test data.  Bottom  line...my experiences were nothing but great.

reviews.text:
Ehormones appears to be going out of business or in severe financial distress, be careful if you're considering ordering or renewing with them. I prepaid for a year of TRT treatment. My 6 month renewal was due last month. Got my labs done and all approved by the Dr. But for weeks now they've been giving me one excuse after another for the order hasn't shipped. Now they've just stopped answering their phone entirely.

I have however been getting tons of promotional texts from them offering steep discounts to prepay for a year of various medications and supplements. Seems like they are desperate for revenue. Be careful..

reviews.text: Dr. Klimenko is a wealth of knowledge and information. I consider her a genius! She has saved me from having an unnecessary surgery and helped me to resolve long-standing digestive issues. Dr. Klimenko is cautious and conscientious and takes nothing for granted. She is scientific in her approach- utilizing a myriad of tests to measure starting points and to track improvement during treatment. On top of that, she is also a warm and caring human being. I recommend her highly to anyone who is willing to take responsibility for their own health!

reviews.text: Dr. Johnson and her amazing team have been the answer I’ve spent my entire 35 years on earth waiting for. I just recently started my treatment plan and feel so encouraged by promising outcomes that are possible. I have never had a consultation, physical examination, and extensive labs that was even 1/3 of my experience with Dr. Johnson. The results from my lab work was broken down and thoroughly explained as a visual during my follow up appointment. Because of the over 100 data points that were tested through my blood I was able to have discoveries into my health that explained why I’m feeling how I am. I started my treatment plan this month which involves supplements, IV therapies, and other services and have already felt improvements. Thank you Dr. Johnson, Farouz, Kailyn, and Brianna for the professional, competent, and very compassionate care that I receive. I look forward to being a patient for years to come.

reviews.text: Dr Johnson recommended BPC-157 to help with the healing of my achilles tendon repair. The staff were extremely supportive while showing me how to inject myself. The healing according to my surgeon was nothing short of amazing. I am so grateful for  Dr Johnson’s knowledge surrounding better ways to heal. She and the staff are outstanding.

reviews.name: places/ChIJLU6vprxYwokRxQ9b0VXhNyo/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VMcXR0YkxTbTVYZmRREAE
reviews.text: Love working with doctor Johnson to support my health.  Currently doing a cycle of ozone and IV treatments to help a chronic alignment.  I’ve experienced lots of inflammation and an overwhelming feeling of exhaustion for months.  With the support of ozone therapy, the IV treatment and following doctor’s orders to manage my diet and get sleep ( a proper 6-8 hours a night) I feel the best I have in months.  I’m finally rise with energy in the mornings. I know this cycle of treatment is helping because after 4 sessions I’m here.  Where’s as a one off ozone session I did at the top of the year did not have these lasting results.  It’s definitely worth the time and investment in your health and for me, my happiness.

reviews.text: I have been seeing Dr. Ruth for over four years and I absolutely love this practice. I used to use Zocdoc to find a doctor here and there for anything that had come up for me in the moment. When I was asked who my primary care doctor was, I never had a real answer until I met Dr. Ruth. I truly appreciate feeling seen and heard, my questions and concerns are always taken seriously, and I can trust that Dr. Ruth wants to find the cause of symptoms and has a genuine care for my well-being. Her staff are kind and generous and always make me feel at home. It is truly such a delightful experience, I almost don’t want to tell anyone about it because it feels like a little safe haven in the middle of Midtown! I’m truly happy with my experiences here and I’m proud to say I finally have a primary care doctor that I love.

reviews.text: Dr Borenstein is the best. Very knowledgeable. Willing to treat the condition with both medicine and natural methods/supplements.  This is the future of medicine. Traditional hospital-based practices act like factories. Dr Borenstein is a real doctor. Only took off one star because his admin, Lisa, is very rude and difficult to communicate with.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVZpFG_ZYwokRf-K1gPks8nc/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZdjZPdEpBEAE
reviews.text: I came to Dr Borenstein over a year ago with a torn meniscus injury to my knee. He offered me a free evaluation. A week later he performed a stem cell procedure and after a 10 days I was able to walk up and down the stairs without any pain!! He called me several times after the procedure to see how I was doing . I have been pain free for over a year now and I can walk for 1 1/2 miles every day and I have no problem with running on the treadmill .The best thing was that I was able to avoid surgery. I highly recommend Dr Borenstein and his staff at the New York Stem Cell Treatment Center  if you contemplating Stem cells for your knees.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVZpFG_ZYwokRf-K1gPks8nc/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZZ09yODNnRRAB
reviews.text:
I am a 49 year old male who was diagnosed two years ago with osteoarthritis in both hips. The recommendation was that I get a hip replacement on both hips, but was also cautioned that due to my age, I would likely have to repeat the process in 10 years' time. That was not an option for me so I opted to manage the situation as best I could.

In December 2016 my hips started hurting me more and I knew that I had to address my situation. After extensive searching, I found Dr Borenstein and contacted him via his website. I was pleasantly surprised to get a call from him that same evening, during which we discussed my treatment options and made arrangements for him to review my records. After reviewing my xrays and report, he advised me that stem cell therapy was a viable option for me, and invited me to make an appointment for treatment.

When I arrived for my treatment I was greeted by Dr Borenstein, who seemed very affable. After completing my sign in forms we went through the consultation, during which I was advised of the potential risks and benefits of the procedure, what to expect of the treatment and my recovery phase, and discussed any other issues that might be affecting me as a result of my condition. I was quite surprised when, on hearing that I had back issues, he requested my MRI and indicated that he would treat that too!

The procedure itself was quite straighforward. Liposuction from the right buttocks, an hour long stroll around Lincoln Centre while the stem cells were separated, the extraction of blood, plasma separation, locating the injection sites and the injection of the stem cells and plasma all took 3 1/2 hrs, including my back.

Did it hurt? Yes! Probably a 5 on the childbirth scale and a solid 10 on the man flu scale. But after the lidocaine injection into the hip after the stem cells, the pain that I had lived with for years was gone! My range of motion was 100% better immediately after the procedure and has remiained that way for two weeks so far.

Dr Borenstein has checked up on me at least every other day since the procedure and continues to be pleased with my progress. I have recommended him to at least 6 people so far and would encourage others to check with him before making a decision that you may regret for the rest of your life.

With physiotherapy, my prognosis for getting back to running is looking good. I am exremely grateful to Dr Borenstein and his staff, Karen and Lisa, for giving me the chance to reclaim my quality of life. Talk to him before you make that final decision. You will not regret it.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVZpFG_ZYwokRf-K1gPks8nc/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZb1ByZThRRRAB
reviews.text:
A few of years back, I fell and had a torn meniscus on both knees. As time went by, arthritis took over and changed my life dramatically.  I live in upstate New York were the cold weather can be an enemy for people with arthritis.  During this time, I saw four (4) different specialists who could not do anything but give me cortisone and gel shots which only lasted a few months and provided “minimal” relief.  I walked around holding on to the walls feeling as if my knees were going to crumble at any moment.  The last specialist wanted to do a partial knee replacement for each knee, which I couldn’t understand as I am only in my mid-40’s!  In search of different alternatives, I did a lot of research into the Stem Cell treatment and decided to meet with Dr. Borenstein.  He answered my every question, phone call and email with amazing knowledge, professionalism, sympathy and understanding.
I was very skeptical at first but felt I needed to exhaust every other avenue before going ahead with such a dramatic and permanent solution as partial knee replacement surgery. I scheduled and received the stem cell treatment November 2016 and the recuperation has been mind-blowing in an awesome and very positive way.  Just six days after treatment, I was able to stretch my knees in bed!  I cannot even tell you when was the last time I was able to do that without feeling that knees would crack.  Little by little, I started feeling better each day. I was no longer doing the “penguin” walk (especially when getting out of bed). Cold days were more manageable and not as painful as they once were.  Day 10th was amazing to me; I was super busy at work and took the stairs, walking down one leg in front of the other (a thought that no longer existed on my mind) and when I realized what I was doing, a HUGE smile of happiness took over!  Since then, everyday has been better and better! Dr. Borenstein has been there for me every step of the way, answering my every text message, cheering me up and giving me the life back that I so desperately needed.  I cannot believe that the FDA will approve the knee replacement surgery, where they will actually CUT your own bones (which is irreversible), but they won’t approve a stem cell treatment that comes from ones own body!  When I go to Physical Therapy (to strengthen my muscles) and I see people there screaming of pain from their knee surgeries and my heart aches for them.  I thank God every day for crossing my path with Dr. Borenstein before it was too late!
If you have been told you need surgery, do yourself a HUGE favor and contact Dr. Borenstein first. I pray that he can help your situation as he helped mine.  I went on vacation this Christmas and was able to dance…Dance, (an activity that my mind had deleted completely) before my stem cell treatment!  I will be forever grateful to Dr. David Borenstein for his extensive knowledge, understanding and for restoring and giving me back MY OWN KNEES!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJVZpFG_ZYwokRf-K1gPks8nc/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJb191WFdBEAE
reviews.text: I highly recommend Manhattan Integrative Medicine.  Dr. Borenstein was able to accomplish what no other doctor could do in three years, make me feel better.  In fact, it is only through Dr. Borenstein that I can enjoy my life again. He listens to how you feel and really cares.  His priority is making you better.  I have yet to find another doctor like Dr. Borenstein. His entire office is caring and understanding that you do not feel well.  They always treat you with respect and are very accommodating.  I have never recommended a doctor but felt compelled to give Dr. Borenstein the recognition he deserves.

This is the first Yelp review or online review I have ever written. Do not go to this doctor nor to this center for care. The staff at the office is extremely friendly and caring and knowledgeable, so this is a classic case of poor management. I am writing this about my mother's care but not on her behalf. I had accompanied my her to visits at this office several times, for Dr. Gulati and for Dr. Kakai, who I review below the review for Gulati. The reviews are based on what I witnessed during these visits, what i observed about my mother, and what I learned from her directly.

My mother, who suffers from Lupus and Hashimoto's disease has been treated by Doctor Gulati for the past year, and also by another doctor in the clinic,

Dr. Gulati showed serious negligence in the care of her patient. Here are some of the ways:

She does not answer calls from her patient nor from her patient's dermatologist at Mt. Sinai many many times, which was about her patient's continuous hair loss, which was caused by Dr. Gulati's medical plan.

Multiple times, under G's care, lab results and prescriptions were completely incorrect, whether it was because of her staff or the particular pharmacy with whom she partners.

If you call her and she calls you back, she will only speak to you via phone to tell you to schedule another appointment, which is another $~300

During the course of her care with G, my mother suffered scenarios where she had no energy, lost her hair, and cried from anguish. She feels that she has wasted her money, health, and grief on these people.

Dr. Kakai, who managed a surgical procedure in the clinic in which patient was not given anesthetics, and was screaming in pain, to the point that the staff had to yell at the surgeon to stop what he was doing. On top of this, Dr. Kakai's surgeon also botched closing up my mother, and she now has a deformed stomach area.

When my mother wanted to see a different doctor, she had asked this office to send an explanation of the type of procedure (stem cell-related) that Dr. Kakai's office did for her, they sent something completely generic, from which the new doctor did not even know what exactly what was done. Yet another form of negligence.

reviews.text:
had a very disappointing experience with Richard Huynh, DO at NYU Langone Health.

This was an FAA medical exam that had been scheduled weeks in advance, yet the physician was completely unprepared. He did not have the required tool to test for color blindness, which is a basic and standard part of an FAA exam. That alone should never happen for an appointment of this type.

Additionally, he was unable to properly address a very common medication that I take and gave me incorrect guidance, stating that I would need to see a special FAA medical examiner. I later confirmed that this was not true and that no special examiner was required.

Overall, the appointment felt rushed, poorly prepared, and misinformed. It resulted in wasted time, unnecessary stress, and incorrect direction for something that should have been straightforward and routine.

I would not recommend this provider for FAA medical exams or any appointment requiring specialized preparedness.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ487cKpRYwokRElhV9RkUu4s/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnMUxHd0RBEAE
reviews.text: I spent so long talking to several of my local doctors - primary care, OB/GYN, psychologists - and no one could ever give me an answer to my rapidly decreasing libido. I spent months doing my own research and was convinced it had to do with my hormones. I finally decided to search for a specialist to handle my delicate situation and came across Dr. Gittens and his office and it looked very promising. Given that all the specialists no longer took insurance for these kinds of matters I made an appointment with his office thankful that they accepted Care Credit! I couldn’t be happier with the outcome! Aside from himself and his staff being very professional and kind, they are also very personable. Thanks to Dr. Gittens, I have been able to find out what my issue was (hormones!) and even find out where and when the issue stemmed from! I am currently in treatment (which is the simplest fix) and my levels have greatly inscreased and I am on the road to recovery and feeling great! My libido is back in action and my relationship has definitely been saved as it was in danger of failing very soon if I hadn’t corrected this issue.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ487cKpRYwokRElhV9RkUu4s/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNpeGZiYThnRRAB
reviews.text: I referred a patient to Dr. Gittens based on the positive reviews for a concern outside my specialty. Unfortunately it was a horrible experience; money-centric with a cookie-cutter one-size-fits-all factory approach. Doctors, we can do better than this nonsense. Let’s be better and actually try to help people: it’s our sacred duty and privilege. Once they had his credit card info on file, they created fake follow up appointments for him which he became aware of only through unauthorized credit card charges for “no shows”. People seeking help should not be preyed upon. Do better.

reviews.name: places/ChIJt7Z2cJRYwokR76EF26IIbjQ/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURMa09xazd3RRAB
reviews.text:
Today  I was explaining to a friend how I quit smoking a long time ago and that I had always thank the goddess for putting Dr P. in  my way. After 26 years, today, I decided to Google him. So happy to have found such great reviews. I was on a business trip, staying at the Royalton hotel in NY, in the middle of the night and feeling awful. How lucky was I that the concierge called Doctor Primas. And around 2am I had the best care in NY. After my diagnosis and treatment (traditional and also great natural products that at the time where not so popular!) The Doctor called the next day's to check on me and kindly said " you should probably try to quit smoking.." of course, I had heard that before. But this time it was different, so different that after so long,  I never smoked again. Definitely, it's how you treat and say things to a patient that makes an impact in there  lives.  Do not have enough words to explain how grateful I am to Dr. Primas for making such a difference in my journey.
Best wishes and warm regards from Lisbon.
L.

reviews.name: places/ChIJAdiF0upbwokRQoWNerZ_DNI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VKUE9xOHF3OVBhTXpnRRAB
reviews.text:
I can’t thank Dr. Bortecen enough for the incredible care and life changing results I experienced under his treatment. I was referred to him from a close friend for anal Botox after struggling for a long time with discomfort that impacted both my daily life and overall well being. From the very beginning, Dr. Bortecen was professional, compassionate, and deeply knowledgeable. He made me feel heard, respected, and completely at ease discussing an issue that can often feel sensitive or even embarrassing.
The procedure itself was smooth and surprisingly quick, but the results were profound. Within weeks, I noticed a dramatic improvement relief from pain and tension, easier movement, and to my surprise, a major improvement in physical comfort and pleasure. It was like a part of my life had been quietly blocked, and now it’s fully restored.
What truly sets Dr. Bortecen apart is his generosity and commitment to his patients. He provided follow-up injections at no cost to gradually adjust my comfort level to the ideal balance, something I never expected but deeply appreciated. This alone is extremely important because you want to adjust the dosage slowly and not going too far at the beginning. That level of care and kindness is rare and speaks volumes about the kind of doctor and person he is.
This procedure, and Dr. Bortecen’s expert hands, gave me a sense of comfort, confidence, and joy I didn’t realize I was missing. I genuinely feel like a new person. If you’re considering this treatment, do not hesitate—Dr. Bortacen is the absolute best.

reviews.text: I’ve had a great experience at Soho Men’s Health. The doc really takes the time to listen and understand your concerns without rushing through the appointment. It’s nice to meet a doctor who truly specializes in men’s health and focuses on addressing the root of the issue, rather than upselling unnecessary treatments. Highly recommend if you’re looking for thoughtful, specialized care.

reviews.name: places/ChIJq2tkmUHFBYgR-CeSTWW07wU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toTGNUaG9PVFpxTkROcFVUTkhTek56YlVsSWVVRRAB
reviews.text: I came in for a consultation about hair thinning and left feeling hopeful for the first time in years. The staff were kind, super knowledgeable, and didn’t pressure me at all. They really take time to tailor the treatment to you.

reviews.name: places/ChIJq2tkmUHFBYgR-CeSTWW07wU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNZMkxyQlVBEAE
reviews.text: As I was driving to springs I became slightly nervous about my decision to go through with everything. I spoke to someone over the phone who reassured me and then communicated those concerns to the clinic before I got there. Upon arrival I was greeted promptly and told to sit down and wait for someone to come and get me. In what seemed like no time someone called my name and I was brought into a room where I spoke to 2 nurses and the doctor before the procedure. Everybody was very professional while also making the experience enjoyable. I went in for my procedure and was done before I knew it. I felt no pain through the entire procedure. I followed the aftercare instructions and it’s been smooth sailing ever since. Overall I would give them an A+ on my time in the clinic and to all the staff that were there that day.

reviews.name: places/ChIJq2tkmUHFBYgR-CeSTWW07wU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VQR2tzN2pRZ2RHdjdnRRAB
reviews.text: I was pleased with the experience. The entire visit was handled professionally from start to finish. The doctor was punctual, which I greatly appreciated, and took the time to listen to my concerns thoroughly. I felt respected and well informed throughout the consultation. The staff was also courteous and efficient. Overall, it was a smooth and positive experience, and I would confidently recommend Springs Rejuvenation to others seeking quality care.

reviews.name: places/ChIJq2tkmUHFBYgR-CeSTWW07wU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toa05qY3pSalJaYkMxc1FYWlpNV3hPZVdsZlUzYxAB
reviews.text: I was extremely nervous about my procedure and Eva, the esthetician who conducted my stem cell restoration treatment eased my fears. I decided not to apply the topical anesthetic because I have long hair and I didn’t want it to be greasy. Eva tested it out on one area and it felt like more of a vibrating massage. That being said, I am not tender headed whatsoever. Once it was time to apply the stem cells it felt like a cooling sensation. Today is day 2 and I literally have no side effects: no pain, no redness, no itchiness. So far I am very happy with the procedure and hope to get great results in the months to come!

reviews.name: places/ChIJq2tkmUHFBYgR-CeSTWW07wU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pVMk9XbDJaVEpWVEZKR1JHVTFWRkZsTkZKalQwRRAB
reviews.text:
I think the price for the procedure was high.
I thought stem cells would be injected into dorment hair follicles but they were just sprayed on my head after preparing my scalp.
The procedure was very fast and painless but compared to other places that injected into scalp was pricey.

reviews.name: places/ChIJRwb9Gi5n04kRlR1zkoLus2I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT200MExUSjRaMXBtUkRsM2VXUXRjV1UzT0UxNVVIYxAB
reviews.text: Slimplify Health and Wellness has been life-changing for me! Chantel and Ali are amazing providers who truly understand the weight-loss journey. They’re supportive, knowledgeable, and make you feel comfortable every step of the way. They listen to your goals, explain everything clearly, and create a plan that actually works. The office is welcoming, clean, and I always feel encouraged when I leave. If you’re looking for a compassionate and effective weight-loss journey, I highly recommend Slimplify—Chantel and Ali are the best!

reviews.name: places/ChIJRwb9Gi5n04kRlR1zkoLus2I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xKRWFVOHhWVEJMYjFOMWFEbDNNVlpzWVRCemQxRRAB
reviews.text: Great programs available at an amazing price point! Chantel & Alison are both excellent providers, extremely professional and down to earth. Telehealth appointments available which was a great bonus for someone with a busy work & school schedule. Always felt completely supported in my journey and never judged or uncomfortable. If you’re looking to feel your best & have the best experience this is the place to do it!

reviews.name: places/ChIJRwb9Gi5n04kRlR1zkoLus2I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21kTGMyNHhUM05OZFd4RGFIbGxjVUZqVkRkdk5FRRAB
reviews.text: I am grateful that a friend recommended I try Slimplify WNY because this place is really wonderful! The ladies at the desk when you arrive are welcoming and kind and the NP Chantel has been awesome. I had previously used an online weight loss service and I’ll tell you, coming into the Slimplify office has been a 1000% improvement over that. It is nice to be able to discuss needs and challenges in person and get treated right away. I have lost a good bit of weight already and am very satisfied with the care I’ve received from this office. I have and will continue to highly recommend Slimplify WNY!

reviews.name: places/ChIJRwb9Gi5n04kRlR1zkoLus2I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsS1puZFBUSFZ3ZFZKT2FHdG5Ua3N3ZDNOeFowRRAB
reviews.text: Chantel was extremely helpful in getting me started in my weight loss journey . I was very nervous about it but she answered all my questions and made me feel comfortable. I’m excited to begin my journey with them and grateful for how motivating and professional everyone has been so far. If you’re looking for a supportive, knowledgeable place to start your weight loss journey, I highly recommend this office.

reviews.name: places/ChIJRwb9Gi5n04kRlR1zkoLus2I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xOelQzWTVSSFZKVWxWUUxXOU1hVVl6U0RoaGVrRRAB
reviews.text: I’ve been coming here since April working with both Chantel & Allison, nothing short of amazing! They listened to my concern and has been helping me meet my weight loss goals! They’ve both been super supportive and easy to work with. Highly recommend and appreciate them both!

I look forward to working with the Team and providing updates in the near future!

The big difference with working with Johanna over conventional medical care is she stays on top of her education and research to ensure you are receiving the most optimized care available. In just the few months we have been working together I have been able to enjoy a big improvement in my day to day life.

reviews.name: places/ChIJv1RVWDHI1okRWphjJ5YZWe0/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURMdElIa3hRRRAB
reviews.text:
Dr Leila is perhaps the finest medical practitioner I've ever had the pleasure of knowing. She found me in rough shape physically and emotionally after years of abuse from the standard medical community.
She got me healthy and stood with me through difficult trial and error experiments with a rare skin parasite infection. She was unfazed by my history of HIV, degenerative disc, GERD, apnea, and (understandably) emotional trauma.

HOWEVER. When I became the sole support for my 90 YO mother with dementia, and the skin problem flared, and my financial security was destroyed by family theft, leading to my depression, she walked away. Completely and suddenly.
Now add medical abuse back at my lowest point.

Dr. Leila's compassion is limited and will end without notice.
Don't feel too safe, and don't depend on her being there.
Treasure her care while you have it.

reviews.name: places/ChIJv1RVWDHI1okRWphjJ5YZWe0/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURza3ZlTGZBEAE
reviews.text:
Dr. Leila is a compassionate, resourceful, and unique practitioner. Her approach to medicine is comprehensive and holistic, and individualized at the patient level.

Dr Leila offers a unique scarce and expert perspective on aging and metabolic medicine; she is always willing to spend the time and effort involved in testing and supplementation that other medical professionals don't have the resources or attention to commit to.

reviews.name: places/ChIJv1RVWDHI1okRWphjJ5YZWe0/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhZ2NmSUZnEAE
reviews.text: A plethora of wisdom and knowledge, helped get me through Chemo and continues to ensure that I have the tools for success to Detox and remain healthy.  Takes the time to do the specific analysis of your condition and test results, and comes up with sound plans.  Far superior service than a 15 min in and out the door apt with a regular insurance driven MD.  Well worth the investment in my health, I would recommend and have, to family and friends or anyone truly vested in their health and wellness.

reviews.name: places/ChIJv1RVWDHI1okRWphjJ5YZWe0/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJa1lhN053EAE
reviews.text:
Showed up today with my 24 yr old daughter for a appt with Zende that we waited 6 months for only to find out tjat Dr Zende left Dr Leilas in sept and we should have received a letter. Ee did not receive a letter and my daughter confirmed the appt online last nite.

This is a matter of life and death how dare they screw up like this. My daughter is at the end of her rope. I would not trust Dr Leilas scam of a practice if you value your life.

reviews.name: places/ChIJv1RVWDHI1okRWphjJ5YZWe0/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJOWNianl3RRAB
reviews.text: I've been a patient of Dr Kirdani's since 2008 or so and as someone who suffers from multiple chronic endocrine and autoimmunity issues, I must say she's been extremely valuable for my own personal health. Her battery of tests have time and again identified important deficiencies and additional diagnoses that my other doctors missed or didn't even think of. She has family medicine experience but her practice is so different from the traditional provider. She keeps herself extremely well-informed - at least regarding my own diagnoses and new the ever changing standards they're associated with - that I can't imagine her wisdom not being an integral part of my health advocacy.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ00z8QZZB6IkRY3czpssOhYI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205S01rUm9WWEEzUzJseWExbGxhVGRUYUd0T2JrRRAB
reviews.text:
Randi takes a personalized, root-cause approach that goes far beyond surface-level care. Whether it’s hormone optimization, peptides, or functional testing, she’s incredibly thorough, knowledgeable, and compassionate. Her expertise in testosterone therapy and cutting-edge treatments like peptides makes her a standout in the wellness space.

What I appreciate most is how she takes time to educate and empower her clients — you never feel rushed or like "just another number." If you’re looking for real answers and long-term solutions rather than band-aid fixes, I highly recommend connecting with Dr. Randi. She’s the kind of practitioner who truly changes lives.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ00z8QZZB6IkRY3czpssOhYI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VKMkVrZjdTdzdMVGdRRRAB
reviews.text: Randi took the time to meticulously get to know my medical history and current conditions before jumping into a plan. We eased into each step and I’ve been feeling better and better as each stage moves forward. Can’t compare to any other clinic I’ve worked with. Her follow up is second to none and she’s earned my confidence. I highly recommend.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ00z8QZZB6IkRY3czpssOhYI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRbWF5UGZ3EAE
reviews.text: I have known Randi Rasberry for several years and have consistently been impressed by her dedication to her patients and her commitment to ongoing learning. She is ambitious, intelligent, attentive, and truly invested in finding the root cause of health issues rather than just addressing symptoms. Randi takes the time to listen, thoroughly evaluate and create personalized plans to help her patients achieve lasting wellness. Her responsiveness and curiosity make her an outstanding functional medicine provider. I highly recommend Randi and Method Functional Medicine to anyone looking for a thoughtful and comprehensive approach to their health!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ00z8QZZB6IkRY3czpssOhYI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvcXI3M3Z3RRAB
reviews.text: Randi at Method Functional Medicine is absolutely incredible. After living with an undiagnosed stomach issue for over 10 years and seeing countless providers, she was the one who finally figured it out. Her approach was thorough, compassionate, and truly life-changing. I also just started NAD therapy under her guidance, and I’ve never felt better. Highly recommend her to anyone searching for real answers and lasting relief.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ00z8QZZB6IkRY3czpssOhYI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VLN0ZvX1BEeXZxM2pBRRAB
reviews.text: I am feeling so much better and I am so happy I found Randi and Method Functional Medicine. I was not getting any help or results from my previous practitioner. Randi is very understanding and knowledgeable who seeks to find the root cause of issues. I am looking forward to continuing my journey with her and feeling better every day!

reviews.text: Simply the best!    Everything about Boris Bobyr and his staff is second to none. I was referred to this office by my niece 18 months ago and I am beyond pleased with my care. reviews.text: I’ve had nothing but positive experiences at Boris' office. The staff is incredibly friendly and welcoming, always making me feel comfortable and at ease. Boris is highly attentive, taking the time to listen to my concerns and thoroughly explain any treatment options. I never feel rushed, and it’s clear they genuinely care about my well-being. The office environment is warm and inviting, and everyone from the receptionist to the nurses goes above and beyond to provide exceptional care. I always leave feeling confident and well-cared-for. Highly recommend for anyone seeking compassionate, quality healthcare!

reviews.name: places/ChIJpQTLWSNJwokR4rGCYiiJCYA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSb2VrZDZkbEJRUWxsVVlreENPR0YyY0ZRellXYxAB
reviews.text: I’ve been going to Boris for a few years now. He knew exactly what I needed with hormone therapy after viewing my bloodwork. He’s knowledgeable and has a great office staff.  He’s always ready to listen and tend to my needs. A great place to go if you have any hormone therapy questions or needs.

reviews.name: places/ChIJpQTLWSNJwokR4rGCYiiJCYA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210Q09HWnhiV1F4VWpVMU9FOUJOREJMY0hSTVRFRRAB
reviews.text:
I cannot say enough good things about my experience with this doctor and his entire team. From the moment I walked in for my hormone replacement therapy consultation, I felt completely at ease and genuinely cared for. The doctor has an incredible bedside manner, professional, respectful, but also warm, funny, and refreshingly down-to-earth. He listens without rushing, explains things clearly, and never makes you feel talked down to. It honestly felt more like talking to a trusted advisor than a typical medical visit.

The staff is just as amazing. Huge shoutout to Rachel, Karri, and Kasha..each of them made me feel so welcome and supported. When I started having a hot flash in the waiting room, they immediately brought me a fan and made sure I was comfortable. Yes, it was a little warm in the office at first, but they addressed it right away, no brushing things off. They truly go above and beyond for their patients.

It’s rare to find a medical practice that’s this well-run, compassionate, and kind. An absolute gem of a doctor and I’m so grateful I found him!

Nelli

reviews.text:
Game Day has been an awesome experience from start to finish. The service is top-notch, the staff is incredibly friendly, and they actually take the time to educate you instead of rushing you through. If you’re looking for a men’s health clinic that knows their stuff and genuinely cares about their patients, this is the place. Highly recommend.

reviews.text: I would highly recommend Dan Bucklaew to anyone. Following a back injury I gained plenty of weight and felt sluggish all the time. With the help from New York TRT I’m back headed in the right direction and have lost 25 lbs in just a few months. He’s very knowledgeable and breaks down the process to success thoroughly for you. 10/10 stars!

reviews.name: places/ChIJowgnrc410YkRdHJgEF3tdsw/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURqLXFmUEdREAE
reviews.text: I've had an absolutely fantastic experience having Dan Buckleaw as as my provider. He is very thorough, knowledgeable, and has a comfortable understanding demeanor. He was great at communicating clearly with me helping me to understand my condition, treatment options, directions, and a clear expectation of benefits and side effects that would accompany treatment so I felt comfortable. He's always been prompt and reliable with communication, and he went above and beyond helping me get my medication covered when both the insurance and the pharmacy were both giving me a hassle. The treatment was a fantastic success. My testosterone tanked after a brain injury and didn't know that had been effected. Now that I have my T levels back up, I have so much more energy, focus, libido, stamina, better mood. I'm 43 and feel like I did in my early 20s. Game changer! I'd highly recommend Dan to anyone.

reviews.name: places/ChIJowgnrc410YkRdHJgEF3tdsw/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNiNm9qZlBBEAE
reviews.text: Dan was great to work with. He made it really easy to get what I needed. Since I was referred by another provider it was a simple phone conversation to get a round of prednisone and prescribed peptides. He stayed in touch and followed up to see how progress was going. Highly recommend!

Everyone here is great and I recommend anyone that wants to take a step in the direction of better help to come here.

reviews.text: What a great experience. From the moment I walked in and was greeted by Tiffany the RN who has the most infectious smile. She is also very gentle with her blood draw. I felt no pressure and very comfortable and confident in the decisions I made after speaking with Megan. My final stop was at the front desk with Mendy who is also the owner. reviews.name: places/ChIJj5B1wNp104kRmScUDamonyc/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25waGVqTjNhSFJVTlV4T2RIcHVYMUZOUWtGVFYzYxAB
reviews.text: The best experience I’ve ever had. I spent a year going through an online clinic and always felt a little unsure about it. Finally, I decided to stop into Men’s Game Day Health — and I’m so glad I did. From the moment I walked in, the team was fast, welcoming, and incredibly professional. They took the time to ask detailed questions, answered every single one I had, and explained things I didn’t even realize I needed to understand. The pricing is amazing, the process is efficient, and the staff is very friendly and informative. I couldn’t recommend them more.

reviews.name: places/ChIJj5B1wNp104kRmScUDamonyc/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25WeVFsRmpZV015ZEZWb1NtaE5VRXhqVUVoS1FYYxAB
reviews.text:
Finally a medical experience where they actually care about you.

Nicole is absolutely amazing. I was super worried before I started and did almost two years of research before committing to an appointment. I was nervous to say the least but Nicole and the rest of the staff immediately put me at ease, explained everything and answered all my questions. There were a lot.

At first the actually would not take me as a patient because of an error with the Quest test. This actually made me feel incredibly comfortable that they were more interested in my wellness and health. When results confirmed it was an error on Quests side and safe for me to continue we started very conservatively and slowly worked out a proper dosage that made me feel my best while eliminating any side effects.

Along this journey, that I wish I had started sooner, Nicole has continued to work with me and is 100% approachable and genuine in sharing information with you. You wont find a better place to feel your best.

I could never see going back to how I felt before and am so confident that I am doing everything safely under Game Days care.

I had an excellent experience at Men’s Gameday Health in Buffalo. The staff was professional, knowledgeable, and really took the time to listen to my concerns. They made me feel comfortable from the moment I walked in. The treatments were effective, and I noticed a real difference in my energy, focus, and overall performance. The facility is clean, modern, and well-run — you can tell they genuinely care about helping men feel their best. I’d definitely recommend Men’s Gameday Health to anyone looking to improve his health, confidence, and vitality.
